zh_ref: 你好，可以听到我说话吗？
en_ref: Hello, can you hear me?

zh_ref: 这次我的声音正常吗？
en_ref: Does my voice sound normal this time?

zh_ref: 可以，我这边听起来没问题。
en_ref: Yes, it sounds fine on my side.

zh_ref: 那我再说长一点，看看会不会更稳定。
en_ref: Then I will speak a little longer and see whether it becomes more stable.

zh_ref: 现在轮到我说一句，你那边能分出来吗？
en_ref: Now it is my turn to say something. Can you distinguish me on your side?

zh_ref: 我只说一个短句。
en_ref: I will say just a short sentence.

zh_ref: 然后马上再补一句。
en_ref: Then I will immediately add another sentence.

zh_ref: 刚才那个切换很快，系统可能比较容易抖。
en_ref: That switch was very fast, so the system may be more likely to jitter.

zh_ref: 今天下午三点我们要开项目例会。
en_ref: We have the project meeting at three this afternoon.

zh_ref: 会议室还是之前那个吗？
en_ref: Is the meeting room still the same one as before?

zh_ref: 对，还是五楼靠窗的那间。
en_ref: Yes, it is still the room on the fifth floor near the window.

zh_ref: 我可能会晚到十分钟，你们先开始。
en_ref: I may arrive ten minutes late, so please start without me.

zh_ref: 如果投影仪再出问题，就改成线上。
en_ref: If the projector fails again, we will switch to an online meeting.

zh_ref: 我先把文档和议程发到群里。
en_ref: I will send the document and the agenda to the group first.

zh_ref: 可以，尤其把预算那一页单独标出来。
en_ref: Sure, especially mark the budget page separately.

zh_ref: 好，那下午见。
en_ref: Okay, see you this afternoon.

zh_ref: 这个接口昨天还能用，今天怎么就超时了？
en_ref: This API still worked yesterday, so why is it timing out today?

zh_ref: 我怀疑是鉴权服务那边响应变慢了。
en_ref: I suspect the authentication service has become slower to respond.

zh_ref: 日志里有没有明显的五百错误？
en_ref: Are there any obvious five-hundred errors in the logs?

zh_ref: 我刚查了一下，主要是重试次数突然变多了。
en_ref: I just checked, and the main issue is that the retry count suddenly increased.

zh_ref: 那先把超时时间调高两秒试试。
en_ref: Then let us first increase the timeout by two seconds and try again.

zh_ref: 可以，但也要记录调整前后的延迟变化。
en_ref: Okay, but we also need to record the latency change before and after the adjustment.

zh_ref: 我这边先拉一份最近三十分钟的日志。
en_ref: I will pull the logs from the last thirty minutes on my side first.

zh_ref: 行，等你拉完我们再一起看。
en_ref: Alright, we will review them together after you pull them.

zh_ref: 嗯。
en_ref: Mm.

zh_ref: 嗯嗯。
en_ref: Mm-hmm.

zh_ref: 你刚才是在表示同意吗？
en_ref: Were you agreeing just now?

zh_ref: 对，我只是想测试这种特别短的句子。
en_ref: Yes, I just wanted to test this kind of very short utterance.

zh_ref: 短句往往最容易让说话人路由不稳定。
en_ref: Short utterances are often the most likely to make speaker routing unstable.

zh_ref: 所以这个场景一定要单独统计。
en_ref: That is why this scenario must be counted separately.

zh_ref: 那我再补一句稍长一点的。
en_ref: Then I will add another sentence that is a little longer.

zh_ref: 如果这句能稳住，说明时长确实有帮助。
en_ref: If this sentence can stabilize the route, that means duration really helps.

zh_ref: 我先说一句，然后你马上接。
en_ref: I will say one sentence first, and then you immediately follow.

zh_ref: 好，我现在立刻接上。
en_ref: Okay, I am following right away now.

zh_ref: 再换回来，看看系统会不会抖动。
en_ref: Now switch back and see whether the system starts jittering.

zh_ref: 我也插一句，增加一点干扰。
en_ref: I will also jump in with one sentence to add some interference.

zh_ref: 如果这里还能保持稳定，那就说明策略有效。
en_ref: If the routing can still remain stable here, that means the strategy is effective.

zh_ref: 这类连续切换最能暴露 false switch 问题。
en_ref: This kind of continuous switching is the most likely to expose false switch problems.

zh_ref: 尤其是句子很短的时候。
en_ref: Especially when the utterances are very short.

zh_ref: 那我们最后再做一次四人轮流发言。
en_ref: Then let us do one last round with all four people speaking in turn.

zh_ref: 第一位先确认网络和麦克风状态。
en_ref: The first speaker should confirm the network and microphone status.

zh_ref: 第二位确认翻译方向和输出语言。
en_ref: The second speaker should confirm the translation direction and output language.

zh_ref: 第三位确认当前音色是否已经正确激活。
en_ref: The third speaker should confirm that the current voice has been activated correctly.

zh_ref: 第四位确认日志文件是否正在正常写入。
en_ref: The fourth speaker should confirm that the log file is being written normally.

zh_ref: 如果这些都正常，就开始正式测试。
en_ref: If all of these are normal, then start the formal test.

zh_ref: 正式测试时，记得同时关注准确率和时延。
en_ref: During the formal test, remember to pay attention to both accuracy and latency.

zh_ref: 还要看同一个人多轮说话时 route 会不会漂。
en_ref: We also need to see whether the route drifts when the same person speaks across multiple turns.

zh_ref: 最后把结果导出来，再统一计算指标。
en_ref: Finally, export the results and then compute the metrics together.
